prompt: Go to en.wikipedia.org and look up "Argentina". Extract key facts and show them as: 1) A ```cards component with Population, Area, Capital, GDP, and Currency (use real numbers from the page). 2) A ```timeline with the 5 most important historical dates mentioned in the article.
text:
```cards
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Population** | 46,735,004 (2025 estimate) |
| **Area** | 2,780,085 km² (8th largest in the world) |
| **Capital** | Buenos Aires |
| **GDP (PPP)** | $1.577 trillion (2026) |
| **Currency** | Argentine peso (ARS) |
```

```timeline
| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| **25 May 1810** | May Revolution – Beginning of Argentina's independence process from Spain |
| **9 July 1816** | Declaration of Independence – Formal independence from Spain proclaimed |
| **1930** | First coup d'état – Start of the "Infamous Decade" of political instability |
| **1946** | Perón elected president – Beginning of the Peronist era |
| **1976** | Military coup – National Reorganization Process (Dirty War) begins |
```
